c=q(V)local F=function(...)return p(X,{...},V,c)end return F end,-43879+43879,function(X,V)local c=q(V)local F=function(F,P,a)return p(X,{F,P,a},V,c)end return F end,function()D=(853166+-853165)+D T[D]=-988841-(-988842)return D end,function(X,V)local c=q(V)local F=function(F,P,a,J,C,H)return p(X,{F;P,a;J;C;H},V,c)end return F end,function(X,V)local c=q(V)local F=function(F,P,a,J,C)return p(X,{F;P;a,J;C},V,c)end return F end return(l(96946+7295957,{}))(c(C))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[V(307125+-315111)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
